# Alexa's Cleaning Services

> Professional house and commercial cleaning in Placerville, CA and El Dorado County. Licensed, insured, no contracts, no rescheduling fees. Owned and operated by Alejandra Ortiz for 15+ years.

## Key Facts
- Business: Alexa's Cleaning Services
- Owner: Alejandra Ortiz (M.B.A.)
- Location: 2838 Schnell School Rd #2, Placerville, CA 95667
- Phone: (530) 214-6361
- Email: alexascleaningplacerville@gmail.com
- License: #074540, County of El Dorado
- Fully Insured: Yes
- Service Area: Placerville, Cameron Park, Shingle Springs, Diamond Springs, El Dorado Hills, Pollock Pines, and all of El Dorado County
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars (9 reviews)
- Homes Cleaned: 500+
- Years in Business: 15+

## What Makes Us Different
- No contracts ever. Stay because you want to, not because you have to.
- No rescheduling fees. Life happens. We make it easy.
- Instant quotes. Tell us the size and condition, we give you a number.
- Consistent teams. Same cleaner every visit. They learn your home.
- Licensed and insured. El Dorado County Business License #074540.

## Services
- House Cleaning (one-time, weekly, bi-weekly, monthly)
- Deep Cleaning (seasonal refreshes, top-to-bottom)
- Commercial & Office Cleaning
- Post-Construction Cleanup
- Airbnb & Vacation Rental Turnover
- Property & Apartment Cleaning (move-in/move-out)
- Church Cleaning
- Warehouse Cleaning
- Gym Cleaning
- Daycare Cleaning
- Medical Cleaning
- Eco-Friendly Cleaning
- Floor Cleaning
- Disinfecting & Sanitization
- Retail Store Cleaning
- Window Cleaning
- Janitorial Cleaning
